title: Which Is a Better Investment, CleanSpark Inc or Marathon Digital Holdings Inc Stock?
text: The article compares CleanSpark, Inc. (CLSK) and MARA Holdings, Inc. (MARA), formerly Marathon Digital Holdings. Both operate in bitcoin mining and digital infrastructure. As of May 14, 2026, MARA has a market cap of $5.1B, YTD performance of +38.5%, 12-month revenue of $867.8M, net profit margin of -234.8%, and revenue growth of -18.4%. CLSK has a market cap of $3.6B, YTD performance of +29.5%, 12-month revenue of $739.9M, net profit margin of -67.7%, and revenue growth of -24.9%. Both companies received poor ratings across key metrics. Value Grade: MARA (F), CLSK (D). Growth Grade: MARA (F), CLSK (D). Earnings Estimates: Both received F grades. The article states: Neither MARA Holdings, Inc., CleanSpark or Inc. has a high enough value grade to be considered a winner. Investors should conduct additional research before investing in either stock, considering personal risk tolerance and financial goals.
